seo.title: JOB 1 Hybrid - Strength and Cardio Workout Program
seo.description: JOB 1 Hybrid will get your heart pumping by combining both strength and cardio in the same workout. Start training with Jennifer Jacobs today!

trainers.bioBodi: Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts and heart-pounding classes, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.

data.descriptionShort: 20 minutes of strength training and cycling in one workout.
data.descriptionLong: Get both resistance training and cycling in these five Job 1 Hybrid workouts. Start with 10 minutes of targeted strength building, and then hop on your bike for a 10-minute ride that helps torch major calories.

modules.categories: Cardio, Strength, Slim & Sculpt, Weight Loss, Cycling, Core

modules.title: What are the workouts like?
modules.content: Train on and off the bike in one heart-pumping 20-minute workout! The Job 1 Hybrid Calendar features 5 workouts that combine 10 minutes of targeted strength training with 10 minutes of cycling. You’ll need dumbbells, resistance loops, and a BODi Bike (or any other stationary bike) to do these routines. You can follow the Job 1 Hybrid Calendar on its own or feel free to stack any of these hybrid workouts onto any regular Job 1 workout for an extra challenge.

trainers.bio: Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts and heart-pounding classes, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.
